message:
fix(prompt): correct line number display for implicit start range

When using file range syntax like `:50` (first 50 lines), the header
would incorrectly display "(lines 0-50)" instead of "(lines 1-50)".
File lines are 1-indexed, so display 1 when StartLine is implicitly 0.

Also replace deprecated strings.Title with local capitalize helper
in robot package to fix Go 1.18+ deprecation warnings.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
